zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire於1295年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯特維其時，她的父親John Conyers20歲，母親Elizabeth de Aton19歲。她於大約1324年與Thurston de Holland II在英國英格蘭藍卡爾丹頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1355年在法國豪-諾門迪艾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire于1295年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯特維其时，她的父亲John Conyers20岁，母亲Elizabeth de Aton19岁。她于大约1324年与Thurston de Holland II在英国英格兰藍卡爾丹頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1355年在法国豪-諾門迪艾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Collyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Collier
meanings: English: from Middle English colier, in most parts of the country ‘maker or seller of charcoal’, but in some areas (such as Bolton le Moors and Wigan, Lancashire) where coal measures were near the surface, ‘miner or seller of coal’ (in the modern sense, ‘fossil fuel’). The name was taken to Ireland from England and was first recorded there in 1305. In Petty's ‘census’ of 1659, it was recorded as a principal surname in Meath.
English: occupational name from Middle English coilour, coliour, culliour, Old French coileor, coillour ‘tax collector’. Surnames with this origin seem to have died out in Britain.
French (northern): from collier ‘collar’, a metonymic occupational name for a maker of collars.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire was born in 1295, in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Conyers, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth de Aton, was 19. She married Thurston de Holland II about 1324, in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1355, in Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire est née en 1295, à Prestwich, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Conyers, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Aton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thurston de Holland II environ 1324, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1355, à Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire 1295 in Prestwich, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Conyers 20 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Aton 19. Sie hat um 1324 in Denton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Thurston de Holland II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1355 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire è nata il nel 1295 nel Prestwich, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Conyers, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Aton, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thurston de Holland II circa 1324, nel Denton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1355, nel Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashireが1295年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストウィチで生まれた時，父John Conyersは20歳，母Elizabeth de Atonは19歳であった。約1324年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアデントンでThurston de Holland IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1355年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플레스트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Conyers(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Aton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 덴턴에서 Thurston de Holland II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1355년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire nasceu em 1295, em Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Conyers, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Aton, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thurston de Holland II aproximadamente 1324, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1355, em Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire родилась в 1295 г. в местности прествич, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Conyers было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Aton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thurston de Holland II около 1324 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1355 г. в местности эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary De Collyer of Lancashire nació en 1295, en Prestwich, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Conyers, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Aton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thurston de Holland II aproximadamente 1324, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1355, en Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
